---
title: "Supporting Information"
subtitle: "Hippocampal-to-Ventricle Ratio as a Head-Size-Independent Biomarker: Sex Differences and Cognitive Associations in 27,680 UK Biobank Participants"
author:
  - name: Sofia Fernandez-Lozano
  - name: Louis D. Collins
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: false
    embed-resources: true
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        .gt_table, .gt_table th, .gt_table td {
          font-size: 14px !important;
        }
        table, th, td {
          font-size: 14px !important;
        }
        </style>
  pdf:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    documentclass: article
    geometry:
      - margin=1in
    latex-max-runs: 20
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{array}
        \usepackage{booktabs}
        \usepackage{longtable}
        \usepackage{amsmath}
        \usepackage{amssymb}
        \usepackage{textcomp}
        \usepackage{fontspec}
        \setmainfont{Latin Modern Roman}
        \usepackage{newunicodechar}
        \newunicodechar{ε}{\ensuremath{\varepsilon}}
        % Center longtables
        \setlength{\LTleft}{\fill}
        \setlength{\LTright}{\fill}
        % Supplementary numbering: Table S1, Figure S1, etc.
        \renewcommand{\thetable}{S\arabic{table}}
        \renewcommand{\thefigure}{S\arabic{figure}}
        % Force exact placement so floats don't drift
        \usepackage{float}
        \floatplacement{table}{H}
        \floatplacement{figure}{H}
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  eval: true
bibliography: references.bib
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

# Activate renv (quarto runs R with --vanilla, skipping .Rprofile)
renv::load(file.path(getwd(), ".."))

library(here)
library(data.table)
library(gt)
here::i_am("reports-src/supplementary.qmd")
source(here("reports-src/_common.R"))

# Load pre-computed manuscript environment (from R/12_manuscript_objects.R)
ms <- read_rds_safe(here("data/derivatives/manuscript_env.rds"), "manuscript environment")
list2env(ms$scalars, envir = environment())
list2env(ms$data, envir = environment())
list2env(ms$tables, envir = environment())
```

# Supplementary Tables {.unnumbered}

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-cog-battery
#| tbl-cap: "Cognitive test battery administered at the UK Biobank imaging visit with field identifiers."

cog_battery <- data.table(
  Domain = c("Memory", "Memory", "Memory",
             "Processing Speed", "Processing Speed", "Processing Speed",
             "Executive Function",
             "Reasoning", "Reasoning", "Reasoning",
             "Verbal", "Numeric"),
  Test = c("Pairs Matching (round 1)", "Pairs Matching (round 2)", "Prospective Memory",
           "Reaction Time", "Symbol Digit Substitution", "Trail Making A",
           "Trail Making B",
           "Fluid Intelligence", "Matrix Reasoning", "Tower Rearranging",
           "Vocabulary", "Numeric Memory"),
  `UK Biobank Field` = c("399", "400", "20018",
                         "20023", "20159", "6348",
                         "6350",
                         "20016", "6373", "21004",
                         "6364", "4282"),
  Description = c("Number of errors in visual memory task",
                  "Number of errors in delayed recall",
                  "Correct execution of delayed instruction",
                  "Mean response time (ms)",
                  "Number correct in 60 seconds",
                  "Time to complete (s)",
                  "Time to complete (s)",
                  "Number correct in 13 verbal-numerical items",
                  "Number correct in non-verbal reasoning",
                  "Planning task score",
                  "Number of synonyms identified",
                  "Maximum digit span")
)

cog_battery |>
  gt(groupname_col = "Domain") |>
  tab_header(
    title = "Cognitive Test Battery",
    subtitle = "UK Biobank imaging visit assessments"
  ) |>
  cols_label(`UK Biobank Field` = "Field ID") |>
  gt_pdf_style()
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-sem-covariates-fields
#| tbl-cap: "SEM model covariates with UK Biobank field identifiers. Age² included in HVR and HC-RES models only. IMDP available for England subsample only. Site modeled as random effect in GAMLSS; cluster-robust SE in pooled SEM."

data.table(
  Variable = c("Age", "Age²", "ICV", "IMDP", "Education", "Site"),
  Description = c(
    "Age at imaging visit (years)",
    "Quadratic age term",
    "Intracranial volume (cc)",
    "Index of Multiple Deprivation",
    "Educational attainment (years)",
    "UK Biobank assessment centre"
  ),
  Field_ID = c(
    "21003",
    "Derived",
    "Derived",
    "26410",
    "6138",
    "54"
  )
) |>
  gt(rowname_col = "Variable") |>
  cols_label(
    Description = "Description",
    Field_ID = "UK Biobank Field"
  ) |>
  tab_header(title = "SEM Model Covariates") |>
  gt_pdf_style()
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-temporal-stability
#| tbl-cap: "Test-retest reliability of brain measures across a mean follow-up interval of 2.7 years (SD = 1.1). N = 2,935 participants with both ses-2 and ses-3 imaging. ICC = intraclass correlation coefficient (two-way, absolute agreement); not to be confused with ICV (intracranial volume)."

if (!is.null(stability_dt)) {
  stability_dt |>
    gt(groupname_col = "ROI") |>
    fmt_number(columns = c(`Pearson r`, ICC), decimals = 3) |>
    tab_header(title = "Temporal Stability of Brain Measures") |>
    gt_pdf_style()
} else {
  gt(data.table(Message = "Longitudinal data not available")) |>
    tab_header(title = "Temporal Stability")
}
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-hvr-centiles-female
#| tbl-cap: "Hippocampal-to-Ventricle Ratio (HVR) normative centiles for females by hemisphere. Values at 5-year age intervals for clinical reference."
format_centile_hemisphere_gt(
  norm_tables, roi = "HVR", adj = "NON", sex = "Female",
  title = "HVR Normative Centiles: Females (by Hemisphere)",
  ages_subset = seq(45, 80, by = 5),
  centiles = c("p10", "p25", "p50", "p75", "p90")
)
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-hvr-centiles-male
#| tbl-cap: "Hippocampal-to-Ventricle Ratio (HVR) normative centiles for males by hemisphere. Values at 5-year age intervals for clinical reference."
format_centile_hemisphere_gt(
  norm_tables, roi = "HVR", adj = "NON", sex = "Male",
  title = "HVR Normative Centiles: Males (by Hemisphere)",
  ages_subset = seq(45, 80, by = 5),
  centiles = c("p10", "p25", "p50", "p75", "p90")
)
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-hc-centiles-female
#| tbl-cap: "Hippocampal volume normative centiles for females by hemisphere (ICV-controlled). Given significant lateralization (right HC > left HC in females), hemisphere-specific norms are provided."
format_centile_hemisphere_gt(
  norm_tables, roi = "HC", adj = "NON", sex = "Female",
  title = "HC Normative Centiles: Females (cc, by Hemisphere)",
  ages_subset = seq(45, 80, by = 5),
  centiles = c("p10", "p25", "p50", "p75", "p90")
)
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-hc-centiles-male
#| tbl-cap: "Hippocampal volume normative centiles for males by hemisphere (ICV-controlled)."
format_centile_hemisphere_gt(
  norm_tables, roi = "HC", adj = "NON", sex = "Male",
  title = "HC Normative Centiles: Males (cc, by Hemisphere)",
  ages_subset = seq(45, 80, by = 5),
  centiles = c("p10", "p25", "p50", "p75", "p90")
)
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-lv-centiles-female
#| tbl-cap: "Lateral ventricular volume normative centiles for females by hemisphere (ICV-controlled)."
format_centile_hemisphere_gt(
  norm_tables, roi = "LV", adj = "NON", sex = "Female",
  title = "LV Normative Centiles: Females (cc, by Hemisphere)",
  ages_subset = seq(45, 80, by = 5),
  centiles = c("p10", "p25", "p50", "p75", "p90")
)
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-lv-centiles-male
#| tbl-cap: "Lateral ventricular volume normative centiles for males by hemisphere (ICV-controlled)."
format_centile_hemisphere_gt(
  norm_tables, roi = "LV", adj = "NON", sex = "Male",
  title = "LV Normative Centiles: Males (cc, by Hemisphere)",
  ages_subset = seq(45, 80, by = 5),
  centiles = c("p10", "p25", "p50", "p75", "p90")
)
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-gamlss-hvr-coef
#| tbl-cap: "GAMLSS model coefficients for HVR normative curves (transfer model without site). $\\mu$ = location (mean), $\\sigma$ = scale (variance), $\\nu$ = skewness. Bold indicates p < .05."

if (!is.null(hvr_coefs)) {
  format_gamlss_coef_gt(hvr_coefs, title = "GAMLSS Model: Hippocampal-to-Ventricle Ratio (HVR)")
}
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-gamlss-hc-coef
#| tbl-cap: "GAMLSS model coefficients for hippocampal volume normative curves (transfer model without site). $\\mu$ = location (mean), $\\sigma$ = scale (variance), $\\nu$ = skewness. Bold indicates p < .05."

if (!is.null(hc_coefs)) {
  format_gamlss_coef_gt(hc_coefs, title = "GAMLSS Model: Hippocampal Volume (HC)")
}
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-measurement-invariance
#| tbl-cap: "Measurement invariance testing for cognitive bifactor model. Delta-CFI and Delta-RMSEA within recommended thresholds at each step supports strict invariance."
format_minv_gt(cfa_minv)
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-sem-paths-by-sex
#| tbl-cap: "Brain-cognition path coefficients by sex. $\\beta$ = standardized coefficient. Bold indicates p < .05. Multi-group SEM with sex-stratified parameter estimation."
format_sem_paths_by_sex_gt(sem_params)
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-sem-fit
#| tbl-cap: "Fit indices for structural equation models. Pooled models include sex as covariate; sex-stratified models estimate parameters separately. Good fit: CFI/TLI > 0.95, RMSEA < 0.06, SRMR < 0.08."
if (!is.null(sem_fit_dt)) {
  format_sem_fit_gt(sem_fit_dt)
}
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-sem-loadings
#| tbl-cap: "SEM measurement model: Factor loadings by sex. $\\lambda$ = standardized loading; SE = standard error. Bold indicates p < .05. Loadings constrained to 1.0 for scale identification not shown. Memory-Specific factor showed estimation failure in females and non-significant loadings in males (factor collapse); see Limitations."

if (!is.null(loadings_dt) && nrow(loadings_dt) > 0) {
  format_sem_loadings_gt(loadings_dt, model_name = "HVR Model")
}
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-sem-covariate-effects
#| tbl-cap: "SEM covariate effects on cognitive factors. $\\beta$ = standardized coefficient; SE = standard error. Bold indicates p < .05. Memory-Specific factor not shown due to factor collapse."

format_sem_covariates_gt(covar_dt, model_name = "HVR Model")
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-site-adjusted
#| tbl-cap: "Sex difference effect sizes with site adjustment. ICC = intraclass correlation coefficient indicating proportion of variance attributable to site."
if ("SITE_ADJUSTED" %in% names(sex_diff) && nrow(sex_diff$SITE_ADJUSTED) > 0) {
  site_dt <- sex_diff$SITE_ADJUSTED[SIDE == "LR", .(ROI_LABEL, ADJ_LABEL, ICC_SITE, ESTIMATE, CI_LOWER, CI_UPPER)]
  site_dt[ADJ_LABEL == "HVR (Self-Normalizing)", ADJ_LABEL := "Self-normalizing"]
  site_dt[, `95% CI` := sprintf("[%.3f, %.3f]", CI_LOWER, CI_UPPER)]

  site_dt[, .(ROI_LABEL, ADJ_LABEL, ICC_SITE, d = ESTIMATE, `95% CI`)] |>
    gt(groupname_col = "ROI_LABEL", rowname_col = "ADJ_LABEL") |>
    cols_label(ICC_SITE = "Site ICC") |>
    fmt_number(columns = c(ICC_SITE, d), decimals = 3) |>
    tab_spanner(label = "Effect Size", columns = c(d, `95% CI`)) |>
    tab_header(title = "Site-Adjusted Effect Sizes") |>
    tab_stubhead(label = "Adjustment") |>
    gt_pdf_style()
}
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-hemisphere
#| tbl-cap: "Sex differences by hemisphere. HC/LV = ICV-residualized; HVR = self-normalizing ratio. d = Cohen's d (positive = females > males)."
hemi_dt <- get_hemisphere_comparison(sex_diff)
if (!is.null(hemi_dt) && nrow(hemi_dt) > 0) {
  roi_full_names <- c("HVR" = "Hippocampal-to-Ventricle Ratio",
                      "HC" = "Hippocampus",
                      "LV" = "Lateral Ventricles")
  hemi_dt[, ROI_LABEL := fifelse(ROI %in% names(roi_full_names), roi_full_names[ROI], ROI_LABEL)]
  hemi_dt[, ROI_LABEL := factor(ROI_LABEL, levels = roi_full_names)]
  hemi_dt[, Hemisphere := fifelse(SIDE == "L", "Left", "Right")]
  hemi_dt[, `95% CI` := sprintf("[%.3f, %.3f]", CI_LOWER, CI_UPPER)]

  hemi_dt[, .(ROI_LABEL, Hemisphere, d = ESTIMATE, `95% CI`)] |>
    gt(groupname_col = "ROI_LABEL") |>
    fmt_number(columns = d, decimals = 3) |>
    tab_header(title = "Sex Differences by Hemisphere") |>
    gt_pdf_style()
}
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-tbl-sensitivity
#| tbl-cap: "Effect sizes with and without psychiatric exclusions. Sensitivity sample includes participants with ICD-10 F00-F99 diagnoses. $\\Delta$d = difference in Cohen's d; values near zero indicate robust findings."
sens_dt <- get_sensitivity_comparison(sex_diff)
if (!is.null(sens_dt) && nrow(sens_dt) > 0) {
  sens_dt[, `:=`(
    ci_pri = sprintf("[%.3f, %.3f]", CI_LOWER_PRIMARY, CI_UPPER_PRIMARY),
    ci_sens = sprintf("[%.3f, %.3f]", CI_LOWER_SENS, CI_UPPER_SENS)
  )]

  sens_dt[, .(ROI_LABEL, ADJ_LABEL, N_PRIMARY, d_pri = ESTIMATE_PRIMARY, ci_pri,
              N_SENS, d_sens = ESTIMATE_SENS, ci_sens, DIFF)] |>
    gt(groupname_col = "ROI_LABEL", rowname_col = "ADJ_LABEL") |>
    cols_label(
      N_PRIMARY = "N", d_pri = "d", ci_pri = "95% CI",
      N_SENS = "N", d_sens = "d", ci_sens = "95% CI",
      DIFF = "Δd"
    ) |>
    fmt_number(columns = c(N_PRIMARY, N_SENS), decimals = 0, use_seps = TRUE) |>
    fmt_number(columns = c(d_pri, d_sens, DIFF), decimals = 3) |>
    tab_spanner(label = "Primary Sample", columns = c(N_PRIMARY, d_pri, ci_pri)) |>
    tab_spanner(label = "Sensitivity Sample", columns = c(N_SENS, d_sens, ci_sens)) |>
    tab_header(
      title = "Sensitivity Analysis: Including Psychiatric Diagnoses",
      subtitle = "Comparing primary sample (F-codes excluded) vs. sensitivity sample (F-codes included)"
    ) |>
    tab_stubhead(label = "Adjustment") |>
    gt_pdf_style()
}
```

\clearpage

# Supplementary Figures {.unnumbered}

```{r}
#| label: supp-fig-distributions
#| fig-cap: "Distribution overlap by sex across adjustment methods. Left column: full sample. Right column: head-size matched sample (age $\\pm 1$ year, intracranial volume $\\pm 25$ cc)."
#| fig-width: 5
#| fig-height: 7
fig_distribution_overlap(brain_data, matched_brain_data, show_matched = TRUE)
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-fig-gamlss-calibration
#| fig-cap: "Calibration plots for normative generalized additive models for location, scale, and shape. Points represent observed vs. expected proportions in held-out test data. Diagonal line indicates perfect calibration."
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 3.5

if (!is.null(gamlss_calib)) {
  fig_gamlss_validation_combined(gamlss_calib)
}
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-fig-hemisphere
#| fig-cap: "Sex differences in residualized brain volumes by hemisphere. Faded error bars indicate non-significant effects. Right panel shows the right minus left difference with 95% confidence interval, colored by overall sex advantage direction (red = female advantage, blue = male advantage; faded = non-significant difference)."
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 3.5
fig_hemisphere_comparison(sex_diff)
```

\clearpage

```{r}
#| label: supp-fig-sensitivity
#| fig-cap: "Sensitivity analysis comparing primary (strict exclusions) vs. expanded sample. Faded points indicate non-significant effects. Right panel shows the primary minus sensitivity difference with 95% confidence interval."
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 4.7
fig_sensitivity_comparison(sex_diff)
```
